"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\MiniRedisTests.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\MiniRedisTests.dir/objects.a CMakeFiles/MiniRedisTests.dir/tests/cache_test.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedisTests.dir/src/Node.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedisTests.dir/src/DoublyLinkedList.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedisTests.dir/src/LRUCache.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/MiniRedisTests.dir/src/PersistenceManager.cpp.obj
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\MiniRedisTests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o MiniRedisTests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libMiniRedisTests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  C:\msys64\ucrt64\lib\libgtest_main.dll.a C:\msys64\ucrt64\lib\libgtest.dll.a -lkernel32 -luser32 -lgdi32 -lwinspool -lshell32 -lole32 -loleaut32 -luuid -lcomdlg32 -ladvapi32
